title: Classic Enderite
description: Enderite Mod in Programmer Art Style
body:
A Resource Pack for The Enderite Mod that changes the textures to the Programmer Art style

Requires [Programmer Art Fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/programmer-art-fix) And [Enderite Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderite-mod)

Credits

THGABS: Programmer Art Styled Netherite and Crossbow

Mojang: Offical Programmer Art Textures

Nic4Las: Enderite Mod
